---

<p class="key-answer" data-question="Dapagliflozin 有什麼相關新聞？">
<strong>Dapagliflozin</strong> 目前有 <strong>11 則</strong>相關新聞報導，預測適應症 20 個。
</p>

<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Dapagliflozin 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Type 2 diabetes mellitus Dapagliflozin Viatris is indicated in adults and children aged 10 years and above for the treatment of insufficiently controlled type 2 diabetes mellitus as an adjunct to...</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>classic stiff person syndrome（98.2%）</li>
<li>focal stiff limb syndrome（98.2%）</li>
<li>opsismodysplasia（98.1%）</li>
<li>thiamine-responsive dysfunction syndrome（98.0%）</li>
<li>diabetes mellitus (disease)（97.9%）</li>
<li>drug-induced localized lipodystrophy（97.0%）</li>
<li>centrifugal lipodystrophy（96.9%）</li>
<li>pressure-induced localized lipoatrophy（96.8%）</li>
<li>idiopathic localized lipodystrophy（96.7%）</li>
<li>pancreatic agenesis（96.6%）</li>
<li>autoimmune oophoritis（90.4%）</li>
<li>type 1 diabetes mellitus（90.3%）</li>
<li>diabetes mellitus, insulin-dependent, X-linked, susceptibility to（63.2%）</li>
<li>atrial flutter (disease)（62.7%）</li>
<li>cholangiocarcinoma, susceptibility to（62.2%）</li>
<li>hemoglobin C-beta-thalassemia syndrome（62.0%）</li>
<li>retinal dystrophy with or without extraocular anomalies（61.8%）</li>
<li>polymicrogyria, perisylvian, with cerebellar hypoplasia and arthrogryposis（59.4%）</li>
<li>congenital temporomandibular joint ankylosis（59.1%）</li>
<li>permanent neonatal diabetes mellitus（59.0%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
<p><a href="{{ '/drugs/dapagliflozin/' | relative_url }}">查看完整藥物報告 →</a></p>
</div>
